Google is launching Search Live globally

Aisha Malik
9:37 AM PDT · March 26, 2026

Google announced on Thursday that it is expanding its AI-powered conversational search feature, Search Live, globally.

Ad slot

First launched in July 2025, Search Live allows users to point their phone camera at objects to get real-time assistance.

Get the best of TechCrunch

Why it matters

Users in more than 200 countries and territories will get access to the feature.

  • Works on Android and iOS.
  • Supports 70+ languages.

Topics

AI Apps
